name: Korean Library Data MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Korean public library data via data4library.kr API. Enables AI agents to check book availability at nearby libraries, search for books across the Korean public library network, and check real-time loan status — helping Korean readers find and access books at their local libraries.
use_cases: Searching for books and checking availability at nearby Korean public libraries
Verifying real-time loan status of books across the Korean library network
Building book discovery and library access workflows for Korean readers
Recommending available library books based on reading preferences
not_for: Non-Korean library systems (Korean public library network specific)
Book purchasing or digital downloads (physical library availability only)
best_when: A Korean reader or library service wants AI agents to help find and check availability of books at nearby Korean public libraries — enabling convenient access to Korea's public library network.
avoid_when: You're not in Korea or don't need Korean public library access. For international library data, consider WorldCat or country-specific library APIs.

auth.notes: data4library.kr API key required. Free API access with registration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — Korean public library data API
pricing.notes: Free open source. data4library.kr API is free for public use.

known_agent_gotchas: Content primarily in Korean — Korean language processing required
Korean public library availability is real-time — useful but can change quickly
API coverage depends on which Korean libraries participate in data4library network
Location-based queries need Korean postal codes or library codes
agent_readiness.security_notes: Public library catalog data — no sensitive information. Korean data residency. Free public API access.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public library catalog data. No sensitive information. Korean public service API.
